comment.body: A lot of people don't get why the market's falling when the inflation print is soft. But that's exactly what Alma's been preaching, the falling correlation is key. comment.body:
Hi Alma, if you read this before the EOD, can you share the way you are seeing the sequence play out based on this statement in your daily post? 

"One thing I’m still leaning towards: further downside will come into April OpEx to trigger recession via negative wealth effect, and real bottom can be expected in June, into Q3."

I am still under the impression we are going to mean revert prior from the March pullback.  When I read this it sounds like the mean reversion may not occur? Can you elaborate?  Just further downside is expected into April Opex and no further liquidity grab necessary for the negative wealth effect to occur?

comment.body: Anish, you're pathetic. No one called an end-month rally, Alma predicted supportive opex. The bull trap was conditional, which is why there are dynamics to monitor. Only dumbasses hold long through a high vol drawdown, people like you, for example. Cut your losses or switch to puts when you see the long side is done. She's laid out fucking clear what to watch. The basic bias is weakness into april opex. That bull trap would have been an extra wave..the B wave, as some Elliott guys call it. Now go whine somewhere else, you shit
